boarding_add_ons.name: Laser Chase Play Session (15 min)
boarding_add_ons.description: One 15-minute individual laser chase or feather wand play session tailored to your cat’s energy level.

boarding_add_ons.description: Interactive 20-minute playtime with toys, climbing, and cuddles.

boarding_add_ons.name: Deluxe Playtime (30 min, Private)
boarding_add_ons.description: Thirty minutes of one-on-one play in a private playroom with climbing gym and tunnels.

boarding_add_ons.name: Departure Bath & Brush
boarding_add_ons.description: Gentle bath and blow-dry with a full brush-out so your cat goes home fresh and clean.

boarding_add_ons.name: Nail Trim During Stay
boarding_add_ons.description: Professional nail trim performed by our grooming team during your cat’s stay.

boarding_add_ons.name: Gourmet Treat Sampler
boarding_add_ons.description: Assorted grain-free cat treats offered once daily, adjusted for your cat’s diet.

boarding_add_ons.name: Organic Catnip Party
boarding_add_ons.description: One supervised catnip play session with organic, ethically sourced catnip toys.

boarding_add_ons.name: Late Checkout (up to 6 PM)
boarding_add_ons.description: Extend checkout time from 11:00 AM to 6:00 PM on departure day, subject to availability.

boarding_add_ons.name: Extended Late Checkout (up to 8 PM)
boarding_add_ons.description: Extend checkout time from 11:00 AM to 8:00 PM on departure day. Ideal for late flights.

boarding_add_ons.name: Medication Administration
boarding_add_ons.description: Administration of owner-provided oral or topical medications according to your schedule.

boarding_add_ons.name: Photo & Video Updates
boarding_add_ons.description: Receive at least three photo or video updates of your cat via email during their stay.

boarding_add_ons.name: Peak Holiday Surcharge
boarding_add_ons.description: Seasonal holiday surcharge applied per night for peak periods such as Christmas and New Year.

gift_card_products.name: Digital Cat Boarding Gift Voucher
gift_card_products.description: Email-delivered credit that can be used toward any cat boarding stay, including rooms and add-ons.

gift_card_products.name: Cat Boarding Gift Card (Mail Delivery)
gift_card_products.description: A physical gift card mailed in a presentation envelope, redeemable for cat boarding stays.

gift_card_products.name: Digital Cat Spa & Grooming Voucher
gift_card_products.description: Digital voucher redeemable for grooming packages and spa extras.

gift_card_products.name: All-Purpose Cattery Gift Voucher
gift_card_products.description: Flexible digital voucher valid toward boarding, grooming, or retail at the cattery.

grooming_services.name: Full Groom & Nail Trim
grooming_services.description: Includes bath, blow-dry, brush-out, sanitary trim if needed, ear cleaning, and nail trim.

grooming_services.name: Bath & Brush
grooming_services.description: Gentle bath, blow-dry, and thorough brush-out to reduce shedding and dander.

grooming_services.name: Quick Tidy-Up
grooming_services.description: Dry brush, nail trim, and face wipe for cats who dislike full baths.

grooming_services.name: Lion Cut for Longhair Cats
grooming_services.description: Full body clip with mane and tail tuft, includes bath and nail trim.

grooming_services.name: Spa Relax Package
grooming_services.description: Bath & brush plus calming aromatherapy towel wrap and paw balm.

grooming_services.name: Teeth Brushing
grooming_services.description: Gentle brushing with cat-safe enzymatic toothpaste to support oral health.

grooming_services.name: Ear Cleaning
grooming_services.description: Thorough ear cleaning to remove wax and debris, using vet-approved products.

grooming_services.name: De-shedding Treatment
grooming_services.description: Special de-shedding shampoo and extended brush-out to reduce shedding for weeks.

grooming_services.name: Paw Balm Treatment
grooming_services.description: Soothing balm applied to paw pads to moisturize and protect.

grooming_services.name: Flea Bath Add-On
grooming_services.description: Medicated flea bath for cats with evidence of fleas, used alongside your regular prevention.

grooming_services.name: Anal Gland Expression
grooming_services.description: External anal gland expression performed by trained staff, if recommended by your vet.

grooming_services.name: Cat-Safe Cologne Spritz
grooming_services.description: Light, cat-safe finishing spritz with a subtle scent. Optional and fragrance-free alternatives available.

policy_sections.title: General Frequently Asked Questions
policy_sections.content_html:
General FAQs

What are your hours?
We are open for check-in and check-out from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM Monday–Saturday, and 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM on Sundays.

Do you board only cats?
Yes. We are a cat-only facility designed to minimize stress and provide a quiet, dog-free environment.

policy_sections.title: Boarding Policies & Check-In/Out
policy_sections.content_html:
Boarding Policies

Standard check-in time is after 1:00 PM and standard check-out time is by 11:00 AM. Late checkout options up to 6:00 PM or 8:00 PM are available as paid add-ons, subject to availability.

We recommend bringing your cat's regular food to avoid stomach upset. All cats must arrive in a secure carrier.

policy_sections.title: Grooming & Spa Policies
policy_sections.content_html:
Grooming & Spa Policies

Grooming appointments are available by reservation only. Cats must be current on rabies and FVRCP vaccinations for any grooming or spa service.

If your cat has a history of heart, respiratory, or seizure disorders, please inform us before scheduling a grooming appointment so we can determine whether service is appropriate.

policy_sections.title: Health & Parasite Control Requirements
policy_sections.content_html:
Health Requirements

All cats staying with us must be in good general health and free from contagious illnesses. We may decline admission if a cat appears visibly unwell at check-in.

Parasite & Flea Control: Every cat must be on an effective flea control program. We strongly recommend a vet-approved topical or oral flea preventive administered within 30 days of check-in. If fleas or flea dirt are observed on arrival, a mandatory flea bath and treatment will be performed at the owner's expense and the cat may be housed in an isolation suite if necessary.

Please review our detailed vaccination and long-stay policies below for additional requirements for extended stays.

policy_sections.title: Vaccination Policy
policy_sections.content_html:
Vaccination Policy

To protect all guests, we require proof of current core vaccinations administered by a licensed veterinarian.

  • Rabies: Required for all cats over 16 weeks of age. 1-year or 3-year vaccines are accepted as long as they are not expired during the stay.
  • FVRCP (feline distemper combination): Required for all boarding and grooming guests. Must be current according to your veterinarian's protocol.
  • FeLV: Recommended for cats that go outdoors or live with FeLV-positive companions, but not required for indoor-only cats.

Written records may be uploaded through your account or emailed to us before check-in. We are happy to review records for cats who already have rabies and FVRCP vaccines to confirm they meet our requirements.

policy_sections.title: Long-Stay Policy (10+ Nights)
policy_sections.content_html:
Long-Stay Requirements (Stays Longer Than 10 Nights)

For stays longer than 10 consecutive nights, additional health and vaccination requirements apply to keep all guests safe and comfortable.

  • Vaccination currency: Rabies and FVRCP vaccinations must be valid for the entire duration of the stay. If either vaccine will expire while your cat is with us, a booster is required at least 7 days before check-in.
  • Flea & parasite prevention: Cats on long stays must be maintained on continuous flea control. A topical or oral flea preventive must be given within 30 days prior to check-in, and for stays exceeding 30 nights, owners must provide proof of an additional dose during the stay or authorize us to administer a product at their cost.
  • Health monitoring: For long stays we perform regular weight and appetite checks. If we notice concerning changes, we will contact you and may recommend a veterinary exam.

If your cat is already vaccinated against rabies and FVRCP, they typically meet the core vaccination requirement for long stays, provided the due dates fall after the planned checkout. Please contact us if you are unsure whether your cat's current rabies and FVRCP vaccines, along with their flea prevention schedule, satisfy the long-stay requirements.

policy_sections.title: Payments, Deposits & Gift Vouchers
policy_sections.content_html:
Payment & Deposits

A 25% deposit is required to confirm holiday bookings (including December 23–27). The remaining balance is due at check-in. We accept major credit cards, debit cards, and our own digital or physical gift vouchers.

Gift vouchers purchased through our website can be applied to boarding, grooming, or add-ons in accordance with the voucher type. Boarding-specific vouchers may be used toward room charges and boarding add-ons only.

policy_sections.title: Cancellations & Changes
policy_sections.content_html:
Cancellation & Change Policy

Reservations may be cancelled or changed up to 72 hours before check-in without penalty, except during peak holiday periods when 7 days' notice is required. Changes to dates, including extensions of stay, can be made online using your booking reference as long as space is available.

room_amenities.name: In-Room Webcam
room_amenities.description: Secure, password-protected webcam mounted in your cat's suite so you can peek in anytime during boarding hours.

room_amenities.name: Live Playroom Camera
room_amenities.description: Live camera feed from the communal playroom so you can watch play sessions when your cat is scheduled.

room_amenities.name: Window View Perch
room_amenities.description: Large window with a padded perch overlooking the garden and bird feeders.

room_amenities.name: Family-Sized Suite
room_amenities.description: Extra-large suite designed to comfortably accommodate multiple cats from the same household.

room_amenities.name: Climate Control
room_amenities.description: Individually controlled heating and air-conditioning to keep your cat comfortable year-round.

room_amenities.name: Extra Play Space
room_amenities.description: Additional vertical and floor space with shelves, tunnels, and hiding spots for active cats.

boarding_room_types.name: Economy Standard Indoor
boarding_room_types.description: Cozy indoor condo for budget-conscious stays. Ideal for single, relaxed cats who enjoy a quiet, climate-controlled space.

boarding_room_types.name: Compact Standard Indoor Condo
boarding_room_types.description: Single-cat standard indoor condo with perch, hideaway cube, and daily housekeeping.

boarding_room_types.name: Standard Indoor Double Condo
boarding_room_types.description: Two-level indoor condo connected with a pass-through, perfect for up to two bonded cats from the same household.

boarding_room_types.name: Standard Indoor Plus Condo
boarding_room_types.description: Larger corner condo with extra shelves and hiding spots, suitable for up to two active indoor cats.

boarding_room_types.name: Cozy Private Suite
boarding_room_types.description: Enclosed private suite with elevated bed, full-height scratching post, and in-room webcam so you can check in anytime.

boarding_room_types.name: Garden View Private Suite
boarding_room_types.description: Spacious private suite with large window overlooking the courtyard garden, equipped with an in-room webcam.

boarding_room_types.name: Spa Private Suite with Live Camera
boarding_room_types.description: Luxury private suite closest to the spa area, featuring both an in-room webcam and access to the live playroom camera feed.

boarding_room_types.name: Window View Suite
boarding_room_types.description: Bright suite with a floor-to-ceiling window perch overlooking bird feeders, ideal for sunbathers and bird-watchers.

boarding_room_types.name: Family Suite
boarding_room_types.description: Extra-large family-sized suite with multiple sleeping nooks, climbing shelves, and an in-room webcam, perfect for households with up to four cats.

boarding_room_types.name: Family Loft Suite
boarding_room_types.description: Two-level loft-style family suite with ramps and window views, ideal for larger families or very active cats.

boarding_bookings.notes: Prefers evening check-in; cats are indoor-only siblings.
Requesting a quiet corridor away from very vocal cats.
Holiday stay; owner will provide special diet food.
Three bonded cats; please keep them together in the same suite.
